text:
My sincerest apologies if I have wasted anyone's time.

The rrdtool updates appear to be working now.
It must have been something wrong with my systems configuration as opposed 
to the package/port.
Unfortunately I dont know what I have done to my system to make it work now 
as I have changed a number of things.

Sorry again
Adam
